MdTestData.MdString:
- list item
- list item - list item
- list item - list item - list item
- list item - list item - list item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown:
- list item
- list item - list item
- list item - list item - list item
- list item - list item - list item

MdTestData.MdString: - Extra spaces for alignment 1. This is a sublist - Another item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown: - Extra spaces for alignment 1. This is a sublist - Another item

MdTestData.MdString:
# Should be a Paragrah - [ ] a task something
# Should be List SubContent - [ ] a task something
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown:
# Should be a Paragrah - [ ] a task something
# Should be List SubContent - [ ] a task something

MdTestData.MdString:
- Top-level item - Subitem level 1 - Subitem level 2 - Subitem level 3
- This list has - Uneven indentation - But still renders - Correctly!
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown:
- Top-level item - Subitem level 1 - Subitem level 2 - Subitem level 3
- This list has - Uneven indentation - But still renders - Correctly!

MdTestData.MdString:
- Item 1 1. Subitem 1.1 2. Subitem 1.2 - Item 2
- Unordered item 1 - Unordered item 2 1. Mixed nested ordered item 2.1 2. Mixed nested ordered item 2.2 - Unordered item 3
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown:
- Item 1 1. Subitem 1.1 2. Subitem 1.2 - Item 2
- Unordered item 1 - Unordered item 2 1. Mixed nested ordered item 2.1 2. Mixed nested ordered item 2.2 - Unordered item 3

MdTestData.MdString: - [~] something this does not work - [ ] empty - [x] checked - [X] checked
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown: - [~] something this does not work - [ ] empty - [x] checked - [X] checked

MdTestData.MdString:
- Normal item - [ ] Task item without sublist related paragraph between list items.
- [x] Another completed task
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown:
- Normal item - [ ] Task item without sublist related paragraph between list items.
- [x] Another completed task

MdTestData.MdString:
- [ ] Task with sublist - SubItem A - SubItem B - [x] Completed task with sublist - SubItem C - SubItem D
- [x] Mixed list 1. [ ] Subtask 1 2. [x] Subtask 2 - Another item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown:
- [ ] Task with sublist - SubItem A - SubItem B - [x] Completed task with sublist - SubItem C - SubItem D
- [x] Mixed list 1. [ ] Subtask 1 2. [x] Subtask 2 - Another item

MdTestData.MdString:
- Normal item - [ ] Task item without sublist
Unrelated paragraph between list items.
- [x] Another completed task
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown:
- Normal item - [ ] Task item without sublist
Unrelated paragraph between list items.
- [x] Another completed task

MdTestData.MdString: - A list item with **bold text** - A list item with *italic text* - A list item with `inline code`
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdown: - A list item with **bold text** - A list item with *italic text* - A list item with `inline code`
